title: tarenna macroptera
intro: Tarenna macroptera, also known as the Large-flowered Tarenna, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tarenna macroptera include treating fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Tarenna macroptera can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and it has also been used in the form of a paste or topical application.
